name: Wild Mushroom Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1 pound white bread, torn into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large sauté pan. Add the mushrooms and cook over medium heat for 12 minutes, allowing juices to cook out and mushrooms to become soft. Remove from pan.
2. Add onions to the same pan and cook over medium heat until brown and sweet, about 15 minutes. If needed, add a couple of tablespoons of water at the beginning to prevent burning.
3. In a large bowl, beat eggs until they loosen up. Add cream and molasses, stirring to incorporate. Add mushrooms, onions, 3/4 cup cheese, and bread. Mix well to coat everything thoroughly. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Let mixture sit for 1 hour.
5. Coat the inside of a 2-quart casserole dish with butter. Dust with bread crumbs.
6. Preheat oven to 325°F. After an hour, stir the mixture and pour into prepared dish. Sprinkle remaining cheese on top.
7. Cover with foil and bake for 50-60 minutes.
